local function Z(Z)return O[Z-(509273+-484792)]end do local Z=O local z=math.floor local q=table.concat local C=string.len local U=table.insert local t=type local r=string.char local return(function(O,q,C,U,t,r,d,p,H,w,m,g,R,S,v,h,E,F,z,n,W,X,B,e)n,v,F,h,H,g,p,B,S,z,e,X,R,m,E,w,W=function()R=R+(-648823+648824)m[R]=763045-763044 return R end,function(O,Z)local q=H(Z)local end,function(O,Z)local q=H(Z)local C=function(C,U,t)return z(O,{C,U;t},Z,q)end return C end,-720397+720397,{},function(O,Z)local q=H(Z)local C=function(C,U,t,r,d,h,m)return z(O,{C,U,t;r,d;h;m},Z,q)end return C end,function(O,Z)local q=H(Z)local C=function(C)return z(O,{C},Z,q)end return C end,function(O)local Z,z=309394+-309393,O[662219+-662218]while z do m[z],Z=m[z]-(-377540-(-377541)),Z+(931756-931755)if-163068-(-163068)==m[z]then m[z],h[z]=nil,nil end z=O[Z]end end return(g(522992-(-532932),{}))(q(d))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[Z(757361+-732824)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
